name: EuiCard
description: Clickable or informational card with title, description, and optional icon.
visualDescription: A rectangular card-shaped panel with consistent internal padding. Typically contains: an icon or image at the top, a bold title below it, and one or two lines of description text. May include a footer with action buttons. Has a border and optional hover shadow when clickable. NOT EuiPanel (which has no fixed title/description/icon structure). NOT EuiStat (which only shows a metric value and label).

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

image.description: Accepts a url in string form or ReactElement for a custom image component

textAlign.description: Changes alignment of the title and description

layout.description:
Change to "horizontal" if you need the icon to be left of the content.
Horizontal layouts cannot be used in conjunction with `image`, `footer`, or `textAlign`.

title.description: Cards are required to have at least a title and a description and/or children

titleSize.description:
Determines the title's size, matching that of EuiTitle.
Though, card titles can't be too large or small relative to the description text.

description.description:
Placed within a small EuiText `

` tag

onClick.description: Use only if you want to forego a button in the footer and make the whole card clickable

betaBadgeProps.description:
Adds a badge to top of the card to label it as "Beta" or other non-GA state.
Accepts all the props of [EuiBetaBadge](#/display/badge#beta-badge-type), where `label` is required.

display.description:
Matches to the color property of EuiPanel. If defined, removes any border & shadow.
Leave as `undefined` to display as a default panel.
Selectable cards will always display as a default panel.

paddingSize.description: Padding applied around the content of the card

selectable.description: Adds a button to the bottom of the card to allow for in-place selection

hasBorder.description: Use a border style of card instead of shadow

example: <EuiCard paddingSize="m" textAlign="center" titleElement="p" titleSize="s" title="Card title" description="Card description" footer={0}>Card title</EuiCard>
